Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CARUSO CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration In Lieu Of Answer To Complaint is granted. No opposition filed.
